data.title: CorridorIQ and Bonaventure Announce Strategic Partnership to Deploy AI Across $2.8 Billion Multifamily Portfolio
data.description: An AI-powered migration intelligence platform called CorridorIQ, founded by UVA, will be integrated as AI Entrepreneurs in Residence in Bonaventure's portfolio companies. The deployment of predictive tools will be a key focus. This collaboration is set to take place in Charlottesville, Va., and Alexandria, Va. The initiative is expected to bring about innovative strategies with significant impact as it combines UVA's expertise in migration intelligence with Bonaventure's portfolio. The union is anticipated to facilitate the application of advanced technologies in business operations. The integration aims to enhance decision-making processes within Bonaventure's portfolio companies, contributing to their overall growth and competitiveness in the market.

data.title: Trump Brothers' American Bitcoin hits 7,000 BTC milestone as stock drops 94% from IPO peak.
data.description: American Bitcoin, a Bitcoin mining company owned by the Trump brothers, currently possesses more than 7,000 BTC. However, their shares have plummeted by a staggering 94% from the peak following the Initial Public Offering.

data.title: In HelloNation, Landscaping Expert Jeremy Windemuller Explains Mixing Shrubs, Trees, And Flowers Effectively
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan on March 30, 2026, a report discusses the benefits of layered planting for ensuring year-round beauty, plant wellness, and a harmonized garden layout. It explores the method through which homeowners can create a landscape that remains aesthetically pleasing continuously while promoting the health of plants. This technique not only enhances the garden's appearance but also contributes to a balanced design, allowing for a visually appealing and healthy garden environment.

data.title: DORITOS™ HACKS FOOTBALL HISTORY: Was Ronaldo's Iconic 2002 Haircut a Secret Triangle?
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in São Paulo, it was reported that the iconic Brazilian footballer Ronaldo Nazário debuted his famous "half-moon" haircut in the summer of 2002, which garnered as much attention as his remarkable goals. This unique hairstyle remained a strategic choice for 24 years, believed to divert media attention from his frequent injuries.

data.title: Boston Scientific Just Took A 10% Header. Why Analysts Are Still Bullish.
data.description: On Monday, Boston Scientific saw a significant drop in its stock by 10% following the release of mixed test results for their Watchman device designed for patients vulnerable to strokes. Despite this setback, analysts maintain a positive outlook on the company's performance.

data.title: How Merck's New Cholesterol Buster Will 'Move The Needle' 'By Removing The Needle'
data.description: On Monday, Merck reported that its new experimental cholesterol-lowering drug showed superior efficacy in comparison to a combination of three existing medications. The pharmaceutical company highlighted that this breakthrough drug is expected to have a significant impact, potentially revolutionizing cholesterol treatment. The details of the study were not specifically mentioned in the news, but Merck's innovative approach is projected to bring substantial advancements in managing cholesterol levels. This promising development has generated enthusiasm among investors and healthcare professionals alike.

data.title: Gold Price Turns, Oil Rises On Iran War Fallout, Trump Threat
data.description: The price of gold surged on Monday in response to the easing of Treasury yields after concerning developments in Iran. Earlier reports indicated a possibility of escalation, which was anticipated to lead to prolonged high oil prices. The change in market dynamics led to the increase in gold prices and a corresponding rise in oil prices due to the impact of Iran war news.

data.title: Maryland American Water and the American Water Charitable Foundation Provide $196,000 to Support Communities in 2025
data.description: In Bel Air, Maryland, on March 30, 2026, Maryland American Water disclosed that in 2025, they, along with the American Water Charitable Foundation, granted $196,000 to aid 54 organizations. The company emphasized their commitment to more than just supplying safe and clean water.

data.title: BitGo increases Canton Coin services to include trading and onchain settlement, aiming to support tokenized assets' adoption.
data.description: BitGo, a company specializing in digital asset security, has expanded its Canton Coin services beyond custody functions. This move signifies the company's focus on developing comprehensive infrastructure as tokenized assets become more integrated into practical applications. This expansion indicates BitGo's commitment to supporting the growing trend of digital asset utilization.
